name: phase3-on-save-camera-stream
description: Review camera_stream.py for safety and correctness when saved

action.message:
camera_stream.py was just saved. Review it for:
1. _stream_loop() catches ALL exceptions from _consume_stream() — reconnect loop must never crash
2. get_latest_frame() acquires _lock briefly — must not hold lock during HTTP I/O
3. _stop_event checked at top of each chunk iteration in _consume_stream()
4. JPEG extraction uses SOI (0xFF 0xD8) and EOI (0xFF 0xD9) markers — not multipart boundary parsing
5. _get_response() handles Response object, str URL, and dict with url/stream_url/video_url key
6. Thread is daemon=True
7. No side effects at import time — no connections opened in module scope
Report any violations.
